page_metadata.biotools__summary: FitDock is a novel protein–ligand docking method which outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy and speed, if the template is available.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FitDock is a novel protein–ligand docking method which outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy and speed, if the template is available.
